title: malus × denboerii
intro: Malus × denboerii, also known as the 'Pink Perfection' crabapple, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Malus baccata and Malus prunifolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and indigestion due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Malus × denboerii include its antioxidant properties, which help protect against cell damage, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory effects. The herbal preparations of Malus × denboerii include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health issues.
